title: coleus foliatus
intro: Coleus foliatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coleus foliatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Coleus foliatus typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
